system.description:
What it does (SRD): The creature perceives its surroundings to 60 ft. without vision, ignoring darkness and invisibility, though it still cannot see through solid objects and may still suffer concealment from fog or similar.

ThirdEra: Blindsight (60 ft.) is set on this item’s Details tab under Capability grants (vision and senses), not in Mechanical effects. The character sheet lists it with other senses; automated token vision from CGS remains a future enhancement.
